fields.label: Active PCB Specification Year
fields.description: The LHDN PCB Computerised Calculation Method Specification year currently active. Select '2026' once the YA2026 specification is confirmed. This controls which Schedule 1 tax brackets and TP1 relief ceilings are used by the PCB calculation engine.

fields.label: LHDN Specification PDF URL
fields.description: Link to the official LHDN Spesifikasi Kaedah Pengiraan Berkomputer PCB PDF for the active specification year. Auto-populated when version is changed.

fields.label: Last Confirmed Date
fields.description: Date when HR last verified the active specification against LHDN published documents.

fields.label: Last Confirmed By
fields.description: Name of the HR user who last confirmed the specification version.

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Free-form notes about the current specification version or any pending amendments.

fields.label: Changelog Summary
fields.options: Save the document to see the checklist of changed parameters for your selected version. Review all items before confirming.
